metadata.title: My Life
metadata.lyrics:
[00:10.09] Mm, yeah
[00:15.47] 
[00:18.79] Alright
[00:19.73] Ooh
[00:22.16] 
[00:30.70] Got a call from an old friend, we used to be real close
[00:37.97] Said he couldn't go on the American way
[00:43.06] 
[00:45.39] Closed the shop, sold the house, bought a ticket to the West Coast
[00:50.16] 
[00:52.67] Now he gives them a stand-up routine in LA
[00:57.07] 
[01:11.09] I don't need you to worry for me, 'cause I'm alright
[01:16.13] 
[01:18.54] I don't want you to tell me it's time to come home
[01:23.23] 
[01:25.60] I don't care what you say anymore, this is my life
[01:32.71] Go ahead with your own life, leave me alone
[01:38.59] I never said you had to offer me a second chance (I never said you had to)
[01:45.11] I never said I was a victim of circumstance (I never said)
[01:51.82] I still belong (still belong)
[01:55.80] Don't get me wrong (get me wrong)
[01:59.43] And you can speak your mind, but not on my time
[02:06.35] They will tell you you can't sleep alone in a strange place
[02:13.70] Then they'll tell you you can't sleep with somebody else
[02:18.92] 
[02:21.02] Oh, but sooner or later you sleep in your own space
[02:25.97] 
[02:28.12] Either way, it's okay, you wake up with yourself
[02:33.02] 
[02:46.35] I don't need you to worry for me, 'cause I'm alright
[02:53.62] I don't want you to tell me it's time to come home
[02:58.95] 
[03:01.16] I don't care what you say anymore, this is my life
[03:08.50] Go ahead with your own life, leave me alone
[03:13.69] I never said you had to offer me a second chance (I never said you had to)
[03:20.95] I never said I was a victim of circumstance (of circumstance)
[03:27.18] I still belong (still belong)
[03:30.99] Don't get me wrong (get me wrong)
[03:35.75] You can speak your mind, but not on my time
[03:40.97] 
[03:56.54] I don't care what you say anymore, this is my life
[04:03.54] Go ahead with your own life, leave me alone
[04:08.36] 
[04:11.24] Keep it to yourself, it's my life
[04:14.54] 
[04:17.14] Keep it to yourself, it's my life
[04:20.79] 
[04:25.28] Keep it to yourself, it's my life
[04:29.01] 
[04:32.34] Keep it to yourself, it's my life
[04:36.03] 
[04:38.51] Keep it to yourself
[04:39.95]
